title: distichlis maritima var. stricta
intro: Distichlis maritima var. stricta, also known as saltbush or alkali grass, is a type of succulent plant that is native to the salt marshes and coastal areas of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Distichlis maritima var. stricta include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat skin conditions, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
